note: Phase 5.8 Import & Validation pass complete. Based on real filesystem scan. 3 packs present, 7 missing. 79 real-asset Addressables + 111 ProcGen fallbacks = 190/190 covered.
caseNote: 'Thirdparty' lowercase p — FreeAssetImporter v2 auto-resolves both spellings

Quaternius Animated Characters.impact: 5 character slots using ProcGen blue-biped fallbacks

Quaternius Dungeon Kit.impact: Ruins, arches, statues using ProcGen stone shapes

Quaternius Farm Kit.impact: Partial — Mill.fbx from Medieval Village Pack used as farm substitute

Quaternius Crystals & Gems.impact: Crystal nodes using Pebble/Rock FBX + colour materials — recognisable but not final

Unity Particle Pack.impact: All 15 VFX keys using magenta billboard stubs

OpenGameArt Audio.impact: All 16 audio keys are silent 1s AudioClip placeholders

Mixamo Animations.impact: All 19 AnimatorControllers have states but no clip references — monsters/characters in T-pose

Buildings.primarySource: Medieval Village Pack (Bell_Tower, Blacksmith, Sawmill, Mill, Inn, Gazebo, House_1-4, Stable, Fence)

BuildingTiers.note: 9 tiers (palace/barracks/farm × early/developed/advanced) use real Medieval FBX. Remaining 33 use ProcGen composite meshes.

Monsters.primarySource: Ultimate Monsters Big/ + Blob/ FBX, Atlas_Monsters.png texture
Monsters.animationStatus: AnimatorController stubs present. T-pose until Mixamo clips imported.

Resources.primarySource: Medieval Village Pack Hay + Nature Pack CommonTree/Rock_Medium/Pebble_Round

Terrain.realSource: Nature Pack Textures/ (Grass, Flowers, Leaves_NormalTree_C, Leaves_TwistedTree, Leaves_TwistedTree_C)

Environment.realSource: Nature Pack FBX (Unity) — trees, rocks, paths, bushes, grass

KingdomProps.realSource: Medieval Village Pack Props (Barrel, Crate, Cart, Fence, MarketStand, Well, Bonfire_Lit, Bag, Hay) + Nature Pack (Flower, Clover, CommonTree)

WorldLandmarks.realSource: Medieval Pack Bell_Tower + Well + Bonfire + Nature Pack RockPath variants

Characters.note: Quaternius Animated Characters pack not downloaded. Blue-biped ProcGen stubs + AnimatorController stubs.

VFX.note: Unity Particle Pack not imported. Magenta billboard + ParticleSystem stub for each key.

Audio.note: No audio files downloaded. Silent 44100Hz 1s mono AudioClip for each key. All AudioSource calls succeed.

assets.source: Blue biped stub — Characters pack missing
Blue biped stub — Characters pack missing

importInstructions.step1: Install Unity Particle Pack from Asset Store (free): https://assetstore.unity.com/packages/vfx/particles/particle-pack-127175
importInstructions.step2: Download Quaternius Animated Characters: https://quaternius.com/packs/ultimateanimatedcharacters.html → place in Assets/Thirdparty/Quaternius Characters/
importInstructions.step3: Download OpenGameArt CC0 music/ambient/SFX (see FreeAssetDatabase.json audio section for URLs) → place in Assets/Thirdparty/OpenGameArt/
importInstructions.step4: Download Mixamo FBX animations per monster/character → place in Assets/Thirdparty/Mixamo/Animations/
importInstructions.step5: Run: Tools > Eternal Kingdoms > Phase 5.8 — Import Free Assets
importInstructions.step6: Run: Tools > Eternal Kingdoms > Phase 5.8 — Validate Addressables
importInstructions.step7: Verify AlphaLaunchValidator output is ✅ GO (not conditional)
